log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 16 (d20:16 + 0)
Harengon — Armored Tank: 10 (d20:8 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Harengon — Armored Tank HP: 46/59
⚡ Harengon — Armored Tank casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:10 total 20 vs AC 20 — still hits.
--- Harengon — Armored Tank's turn ---
Harengon — Armored Tank casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Harengon — Armored Tank's turn ---
Harengon — Armored Tank casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS!
→ Half damage: 6
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Harengon — Armored Tank HP: 29/59
→ Concentration save: [21 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Harengon — Armored Tank HP: 4/59
→ Concentration save: [24 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
⚡ Harengon — Armored Tank casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:17 total 27 vs AC 20 — still hits.
--- Harengon — Armored Tank's turn ---
Harengon — Armored Tank casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
→ Harengon — Armored Tank loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Harengon — Armored Tank casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Harengon — Armored Tank for 5. HP: 9/59
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Harengon — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
